{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Master Farin
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Master Farin]] is the most highly regarded armorer in the city of [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c5">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
